title: CASCADES WEST RIDE LINE - 211info
text: ALBANY OFFICE CASCADES WEST RIDE LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinated transportation for traveling to and from covered non-emergency medical services. Transportation is provided for those who have no other way to get to their medical appointments. Transportation is arranged through locally contracted transportation providers. Mileage reimbursement is another option for those who are able to drive or have friends or family who can provide transportation. 1400 Queen Avenue SE Suite 201 Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Eligible Oregon Health Plan (OHP) Medicaid clients and InterCommunity Health Network Coordinated Care Organization members that have been qualified and appear in Cascades West Ride Line electronic eligibility files, and Samaritan Advantage Medical clients. Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Transport: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (541) 924-8738 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 967-8630 Main phone Benton and Linn Counties (541) 336-2298 Alternate Lincoln County (800) 638-0510 Toll-free Main phone (541) 924-8738 To schedule rides Toll-free (866) 724-2975 To schedule rides Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information in advance of medical services appointment to ensure availability FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English and Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between Geary Street and Hill Street in a 2-story red brick building Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - STAND BY ME PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OHP AND SNAP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALBANY OFFICE
